prompt: Generate a dungeon crawler-style map, top-down view, showing traps, loot chambers, monster lairs, and rotating stairwells — hand-sketched in black ink on a battle-worn scroll.
prompt_refined: Generate a top-down view of a dungeon crawler map. The map should depict various traps, clearly marked loot chambers, distinct monster lairs, and interconnected rotating stairwells. The entire map is rendered as a detailed black ink hand-sketch, appearing on a textured, battle-worn scroll with visible creases and frayed edges.
